bridge.name: bridge
bridge.description: Token-22 mints issued by the staccana bridge against mainnet-locked underlying.

lst.name: lst
lst.description: Liquid staking token; ratio drifts upward over time.

confidential.name: confidential
confidential.description: Mint has the Token-22 Confidential Transfer Extension active.

extensions.note: Wrapped form of staccana's native SOL gas token. Same canonical address as Solana mainnet wSOL.

_meta.schema_note: We extend the Uniswap token list schema with a per-token `extensions` block for staccana-specific metadata (underlying mint, ratio PDA, bridge spec link). chainId=0 is the staccana convention since Solana doesn't use EVM chain IDs.
